characters.name: Ayaka Usami
characters.description: Ayaka UsamiBiographical InformationKanji Name宇佐美 綾加Rōmaji NameUsami AyakaGenderFemaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorDark VioletStatusRelationshipsEiri Yuki(Ex-fiancé)Hiroshi Nakano(Crush)Shuichi Shindo(Friend)PortrayalJapanese VARie TanakaEnglish VARachael Lillis†Ayaka Usami(宇佐美 綾加,Usami Ayaka?)is betrothed toEiri Yuki, who she likes very much, but she wants what's best for him, so she letsShuichi Shindostay with Eiri and tries to give up on him.Hiroshi Nakanohas a crush on her, and they later go on a date together. Ayaka is a beautiful girl with long brown hair and dark violet eyes.

characters.name: Ayaka Usami

Ayaka is a beautiful girl with long brown hair and dark violet eyes.

characters.name: Claude K. Winchester
characters.description: Claude K. Winchester Claude K. Winchester, also known asK, isRyuichi Sakuma's former manager, and is now the current manager for Bad Luck. K is aggressive in promoting the band--he even carries around a big gun and hand grenades. His concern is first and foremost Bad Luck, but in his shaping of the band's career, he ends up involving himself inEiri Yukiand Shuichi's relationship. He is American, and in the original Japanese version, they played on the stereotype that Americans always have guns and will pull them out any time, any place. K is fun-loving guy who has good intentions, but he has a bad habit of turning his gun on anyone and/or anywhere to support his intentions. K is fun-loving guy who has good intentions, but he has a bad habit of turning his gun on anyone and/or anywhere to support his intentions.
characters.personality_section: K is fun-loving guy who has good intentions, but he has a bad habit of turning his gun on anyone and/or anywhere to support his intentions.

characters.name: Eiri Yuki
characters.description:
Eiri YukiAnimeMangaBiographical InformationKanji Name由貴瑛里Rōmaji NameYuki EiriGenderMaleHeight6'1Weight163.1Age22Hair ColorBlondeEye ColorLight BrownBlood TypeABStatusOccupationRomance NovelistRelativesUnnamed fatherMika Seguchi(Older sister)Tatsuha Uesugi(Younger brother)Tohma Seguchi(Brother-in-law)RelationshipsShuichi Shindo(Boyfriend)Ayaka Usami(Ex-fiancée)First AppearancesMangaChapter 1AnimeEpisode 1PortrayalJapanese VAKazuhiko InoueEnglish VARome Elliot †Eiri Yuki(由貴瑛里,Yuki Eiri?), also known by his real name:Eiri Uesugi(上杉瑛里,Uesugi Eiri?), is the deuteragonist of theGravitationseries. He is a popular romance novelist who metShuichi Shindoin the park and mercilessly dismissed his song lyrics. Through coincidence, they kept bumping into each other, and eventually came together romantically. In the series, Eiri and Shuichi struggle with their celebrity status and their mercurial relationship. Eiri's father is a monk, who runs a temple in Kyoto. He has one younger brother namedTatsuha Uesugi, who is a monk-in-training, and one elder sister namedMika Seguchi, who is married toTohma Seguchi. Eiri is engaged toAyaka Usamiat the beginning of the series. Eiri is temporarily, according to himself, blinded. It is unknown whether or not his eyes will heal. He did it to save Riku Kitazawa (Yuki Kitazawa's (Eiri's deceased past mentor) orphaned child) from being run over by a semi-truck, which is unlike his original character. Later, Eiri and Shuichi find that Yoshiki Kitazawa (Yuki Kitazawa's sister) had dumped Riku off on them to parent, possibly just until she returns and it turns out that Eiri was faking his blindness and the reason is unknown, but it can be speculated that he faked it to get Shuichi back after he left with Riku when he sawRyuichi Sakumakissing Shuichi and realized it was a misunderstanding and broke Shuichi's heart, and possibly believed he had to go to the extreme to get Shuichi to find him and Riku since he knew Shuichi would go to the ends of the earth to find Yuki like he always promised. Eiri is a romance novelist, and because of his charisma, an idol of women. Despite his outward persona, and love of writing stories, he rarely shows emotion. He is sarcastic and caustic to everyone around him, including family. His indifferent personality is likely the result of the Kitazawa incident. As a teenager, Eiri had a cheerful, easygoing personality, similar to Shuichi, possibly the cause of why he keeps his
distance from Shuichi, fearing he would hurt him, as Kitazawa hurt Eiri.

characters.name: Hiroshi Nakano
characters.description: Hiroshi NakanoBiographical InformationKanji Name中野 浩司Rōmaji NameNakano HiroshiGenderMaleHeight193cmWeight88kgAge18 (Manga)19 (Anime)Hair ColorBrownEye ColorPurpleBlood TypeO-StatusStatusAliveRelationshipsShuichi Shindo(Childhood best friend, bandmate)Suguru Fujisaki(Bandmate)Ayaka Usami(Crush)First AppearancesAnimeEpisode 1PortrayalJapanese VAYasunori MatsumotoEnglish VADaniel Kevin HarrisonHiroshi Nakano(中野 浩司,Nakano Hiroshi?), commonly known asHiro, isShuichi Shindo's childhood best friend and band mate. Hiro can read Shuichi like a book and frequently knows what's going on even before Shuichi does. Hiro is also the guitarist and one of the original members of Bad Luck. He dreams of surpassing Nittle Grasper with Shuichi. Hiro is more of a calm guy, unlikeShuichi. He has a lot of information and is pretty wise for his age. He's quite collected and acts appropriately, showing a good amount of manner and politeness in most situations. He's extremely caring of Shuichi, almost acting like a big brother for him. Despite being more of an introvert, his maturity allows him to get along with just about everyone; he has good relationships with most of his coworkers and friends at NG. Hiro is more of a calm guy, unlikeShuichi. He has a lot of information and is pretty wise for his age. He's quite collected and acts appropriately, showing a good amount of manner and politeness in most situations. He's extremely caring of Shuichi, almost acting like a big brother for him. Despite being more of an introvert, his maturity allows him to get along with just about everyone; he has good relationships with most of his coworkers and friends at NG. In the manga, he's frequently seen sticking up for his friends with his witty remarks and quick-thought rebuttals.

characters.name: Judy Winchester
characters.description: Judy Winchester Judy Winchesteris a famous American actress, the wife ofClaude K. Winchesterand the mother ofMichael Winchester.

characters.name: Judy Winchester

characters.name: Mika Seguchi
characters.description: Mika SeguchiBiographical InformationKanji Name瀬口 美華Rōmaji NameSeguchi MikaGenderFemaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorDark BlueStatusRelativesUnnamed fatherEiri Yuki(Younger brother)Tatsuha Uesugi(Youngest brother)Tohma Seguchi(Husband)First AppearancesAnimeEpisode 1Mika Seguchi(瀬口 美華,Seguchi Mika?)is the wife ofTohma Seguchiand the older sister ofEiri Yukiwho she cares a lot about so much that she would give almost anything for him. She has mixed feelings about Eiri's relationship withShuichi Shindo, as she fears that their relationship is bringing back bad memories for Eiri ofYuki Kitazawa, since Shuichi is a lot like her brother when he was younger before the tragedy. However, as their relationship progresses, she decides that she truly wants Eiri and Shuichi together, as she sees that Shuichi is bringing out the best in her brother and gave Eiri hope for people again and gave him happiness she hoped for him. Even though the two are married, almost nothing is shown to reinforce that Tohma and Mika are actually in love as far as the anime and manga show. In fact, Tohma even says "I love Eiri more than anything else in the world" and it is unclear if Mika knew how Tohma truly felt about her brother. The manga hints that the two are expecting their first baby. Mika is a beautiful, yet cold and serious young woman but she can be kind and gentle who cares for her family and will do anything to protect them.
characters.personality_section: Mika is a beautiful, yet cold and serious young woman but she can be kind and gentle who cares for her family and will do anything to protect them.

characters.name: Mr. Sakano
characters.description: Mr. Sakano Sakano(坂野) is a very stressed worker who worshipsTohma Seguchiand tries to be the perfect businessman for him no matter what. Sakano takes every opportunity, though he's not as conniving asClaude K. Winchester. Sakano has a tendency of panicking that often makes him seem like nothing but an overly nervous salary man. Nevertheless, he takes Bad Luck seriously, and has even gone against Touma in order to secure their success. Mr. Sakano is voiced by Takehito Koyasu (Japanese) and Billy Regan (English).

characters.name: Mr. Sakano

Nevertheless, he takes Bad Luck seriously, and has even gone against Touma in order to secure their success. Mr. Sakano is voiced by Takehito Koyasu (Japanese) and Billy Regan (English).

characters.name: Noriko Ukai
characters.description: Noriko UkaiBiographical InformationKanji Name鵜飼典子Rōmaji NameUkai NorikoGenderFemalePortrayalJapanese VAYuri AmanoHaruna Ikezawa(OVA)English VAMegan HollingsheadJessica Calvello(OVA)Noriko Ukai(鵜飼典子,Ukai Noriko?)is a supporting character of theGravitationseries. She used to be the keyboard player for Nittle Grasper, but she joins Bad Luck for a bit on Touma's request. Once Nittle Grasper gets back together, though, she leaves for good. Noriko is brash, loud, but talented. She won't take junk from any of her band members, and demands the best out of them. Often she acts like an older sister to Ryuichi.

characters.name: Noriko Ukai
characters.description: Noriko UkaiBiographical InformationKanji Name鵜飼典子Rōmaji NameUkai NorikoGenderFemalePortrayalJapanese VAYuri AmanoHaruna Ikezawa(OVA)English VAMegan HollingsheadJessica Calvello(OVA)Noriko Ukai(鵜飼典子,Ukai Noriko?)is a supporting character of theGravitationseries. She used to be the keyboard player for Nittle Grasper, but she joins Bad Luck for a bit on Touma's request. Once Nittle Grasper gets back together, though, she leaves for good. Noriko is brash, loud, but talented. She won't take junk from any of her band members, and demands the best out of them. Often she acts like an older sister to Ryuichi.

characters.name: Ryuichi Sakuma
characters.description: Ryuichi SakumaBiographical InformationKanji Name佐久間竜一Rōmaji NameSakuma RyūichiGenderMaleStatusOccupationSingerAffiliationNittle GrasperRelationshipsNoriko Ukai(Bandmate)Tohma Seguchi(Bandmate)Shuichi Shindo(Friend)Ryuichi Sakuma(佐久間竜一,Sakuma Ryūichi?)is the lead singer of the popular bandNittle Grasperalong with Touma Seguchi andNoriko Ukai, and friend of Shuichi. He left the band three years ago to pursue a solo career in America but returned to Japan to reform Nittle Grasper. Shuichi is excited at the news of Nittle Grasper's reunion, but that now makes Ryuichi his rival. Ryuichi is kind and sometimes seems to have the mind of a five-year-old, until he starts singing; then he becomes a really cool, mature, vocal god. Other characters have noticed that Ryuichi and Shuichi are quite similar in their childlike manner. His best friend is a pink bunny named Kumagoro (Mr. Bear in the English version), which is from K-san, his old manager. It contains a tracking device, and is from the K brand stuffed animal line. Although, his serious side shows not only when he sings, but also when he is upset. Not much is known about Ryuichi's past. Ryuichi when serious/angry One of Ryuichi's defining features is his personality. For the most part he goes about life in a childlike state, hyper actively and naively. To further define this attitude, he carries around a stuffed pink rabbit named Kumagoro that he regularly talks to as though it were a living person and often plays with it in public. Though this sort of personality charms a lot of people, it also works for a lack of communication when other characters want to talk to him seriously. There are few instances Ryuichi acts his age, most commonly when he's performing onstage. He'll drop the childlike demeanor and perform seriously. His serious side also emerges whenever he becomes upset or angry enough, which ends up scaring those who know his childlike side more. This side seems to emerge when he wants to make a point, though he acts more like a child when he wants to encourage someone or comfort them. It has also been debated that Ryuichi shares in the homosexual plot. In the EX version of the manga, he is seen kissing Shuichi, making Eiri highly jealous. Most fans argue that this is only part of Ryuichi's childlike demure or that he's doing it to somehow bring Shuichi and Yuki closer together- perhaps to make Yuki appreciate Shuichi more. Yet, fans who encourage this act say Ryuichi, does in fact, love Shuichi. In Gravitation there are clues that show how attached he is to Shuichi. In volume 12 of Gravitation he tells Tohma that he loves Shuichi, but he says it in a friendly way. In Gravitation EX, he got serious when his ringtone started playing and therefore acted infatuated with Shuichi. Ryuichi's character changes with his own or Shuichi's music. If he was acting like a child when he kissed Shuichi, it would have been obvious that he was scheming. However, as the Gravitation Ex storyline moves on, we d

characters.name: Shuichi Shindo
characters.description: Shuichi ShindoAnimeMangaBiographical InformationKanji Name新堂 愁一Rōmaji NameShindō ShūichiGenderMaleHeight165cm (5'5")Weight51kg (112.4 lbs)Age18 (Manga)19 (Anime)Hair ColorPinkRed (OVA)Eye ColorPurpleGreen-brown (OVA)Blood TypeABStatusOccupationSingerAffiliationBad LuckRelativesMaiko Shindo(Younger sister)RelationshipsEiri Yuki(Boyfriend)First AppearancesMangaChapter 1AnimeEpisode 1PortrayalJapanese VATomokazu SekiEnglish VARich McNannaShuichi Shindou(新堂 愁一,Shindō Shūichi?)is the main protagonist of theGraviationseries. His ambition at the start of the series was to follow in the footsteps ofRyuichi Sakuma, lead singer of the bandNittle Grasper, by creating his own successful music band namedBad Luck. Shuichi has short, pink hair. His eyes are violet. His face is structurally feminine, as are his eyes. Shuichi has a slim build, similar to that of a young boy. He tends to wear normal clothes, save for the outfits he wears during performances. Many people were upset on his change of appearance in the 2000 anime, many people argued he looked to young for his age. In the manga, his appearance varies more, largely in part due to the change in art style as serialization progressed. His hair was shown anywhere between very short and long enough for a small ponytail, and the color was almost always particularly dark in contrast to the bright pink color used for the anime. Shuichi has an innocent, energetic and hyper personality that is typical of theukestereotype. This is amplified in the anime, where he frequently bursts into super deformed mode, a production choice which some find distracting, particularly when it occurs in the more serious scenes, but is in keeping with the manga, particularly later episodes. In the first few volumes of the manga, he is much more of a typical high school kid with dreams of being a rock star. Despite his apparent immaturity, Shuichi shows determination and perseverance when he buckles down, and focuses on what he wants. This is evident in his zeal to get to the top of the charts with Bad Luck, and his concurrent aggressive pursuit of his love interestEiri Yuki. He also tends to be melodramatic, easily breaking into tears or getting over-excited at critical moments. A good gauge of his over-emotional state can be seen when the quality of his singing is affected by the state of his relationship with Eiri.

characters.name: Suguru Fujisaki
characters.description: Suguru FujisakiAnimeBiographical InformationKanji Name藤崎 順Rōmaji NameFujisaki SuguruGenderMaleHeight5'3"Age16Hair ColorDark GreenEye ColorBrownBlood TypeAStatusStatusAliveOccupationSingerAffiliationBad LuckRelativesTohma Seguchi(Cousin)Mika Seguchi(Cousin-in-law)RelationshipsTatsuha Uesugi(Childhood friend)Shuichi Shindo(Bandmate)Hiroshi Nakano(Bandmate)PortrayalJapanese VAFujiko TakimotoEnglish VALuke NovakSuguru Fujisaki(藤崎 順,Fujisaki Suguru?)is one of the main characters of theGraviationanime and manga series. He is hired asBad Luck's keyboard player. Though he usually fakes being polite to others, young Suguru is quite similar to his cousin,Tohma Seguchi. Despite his unfortunate proclivity for being controlled by others. While only sixteen years old, he has incredible talent - and knows it. Suguru seems to knowEiri Yuki's past as well, but it seems that Yuki also knows a bit about Suguru himself: he has commented before about Suguru "hiding his real identity". He is quite short for his age, something K and Tatsuha constantly tease him about. Despite being the youngest amongst his coworkers, he shows a great deal of commitment to his career and has a much more professional image as opposed to Shuichi. While he considers both Shuichi and Hiro hisfriends, he shows little sympathy to either of them and tries not to get involved in Shuichi's or K's problems. Likewise, he doesn't share much about himself, either. He's quite mature for his age but seems to have problems biting back his anger. Despite being the youngest amongst his coworkers, he shows a great deal of commitment to his career and has a much more professional image as opposed to Shuichi. While he considers both Shuichi and Hiro hisfriends, he shows little sympathy to either of them and tries not to get involved in Shuichi's or K's problems. Likewise, he doesn't share much about himself, either. He's quite mature for his age but seems to have problems biting back his anger. Suguru's favourite food is melon. He also loves caramel pocky but refuses to eat it around others because it makes him hyper. He can't handle very spicy food. His hobbies include classical music appreciation and playing video games (particularly RPGs). Bad Luck's manager K often teases him about his short height and enjoys doing things to embarrass him, such as sneaking up on him and lifting him up, or speaking to him completely in English just to confuse him. He secretly has a crush on Hiroshi Nakano. Suguru and Tatsuha are childhood friends, having hung out together since they were eight years old, although he finds Tatsuha a bit annoying. Suguru's skill at playing the synthesizer is unrivaled, a result of his precociousness and drive. Shuichi often gets a little jealous of Suguru's talent.

characters.name: Taki Aizawa
characters.description: Taki Aizawa Taki Aizawa(相沢 多喜Aizawa Taki) is ASK's leader and vocalist. He's arrogant and overconfident. There's more to him than looks, though; his qualities as a strong singer are more than enough to make up for his personality. He hatedTohma Seguchifor his original works.

characters.name: Tatsuha Uesugi
characters.description: Tatsuha Uesugi Tatsuha Uesugi(上杉 樹把Uesugi Tatsuha) is the brother ofEiri Yuki. He has the same voice and characteristics as his older brother, but Tatsuha has black hair and eyes. Tatsuha is obsessed with Ryūichi and watches his Nittle Grasper video repetitively. He's quite the perverted and obsessive fan, not to mention a 21-year-old monk.

characters.name: Tatsuha Uesugi
characters.description: Tatsuha Uesugi Tatsuha Uesugi(上杉 樹把Uesugi Tatsuha) is the brother ofEiri Yuki. He has the same voice and characteristics as his older brother, but Tatsuha has black hair and eyes. Tatsuha is obsessed with Ryūichi and watches his Nittle Grasper video repetitively. characters.name: Tohma Seguchi
characters.description: Tohma SeguchiTohma Seguchi(瀬口冬馬Seguchi Tōma) is the keyboard player in Nittle Grasper and the husband ofMika Seguchiwho is the head of N-G recording company that he demands the best from all his contractual bands. Tohma is very protective ofEiri Yukias he blames himself for the trauma Eiri suffered as a teenager, seeing that he was the one who hired Yuki Kitazawa in the first place. He has declared Eiri as his dearest. He is unfailingly polite to the point where he will refer to anybody (including his wife) as-sanand appears to be a friendly and even-tempered person (if also a ruthless businessman). As the series goes on, it becomes evident that much of this is a carefully constructed mask: when Eiri is involved, Tohma has been known to be far from rational and soft-spoken. Tohma is voiced byAi Orikasa(Japanese) andBill Rogers(English). Tohma's relationship with his brother-in-law is a mix of intense affection and guilt over his own failure to protect him from the disaster when they were living in New York. He is over-protective of Eiri to the point where it becomes an obsession as he himself can't get over how he hired Yuki Kitazawa when he didn't know he was actually a pedophile that almost had Eiri raped until Eiri shot him as self defense, and there are several incidents that make it evident that between his business and Eiri, Eiri will always come first.

characters.name: Yuki Kitazawa
characters.description: Yuki KitazawaBiographical InformationKanji Name北沢 由紀Rōmaji NameKitazawa YukiGenderMaleHair ColorLight BrownEye ColorLight BrownStatusStatusDeceasedOccupationTutorRelativesYoshiki Kitazawa (Younger Brother)Riku Kitazawa (Son)RelationshipsEiri Yuki(Former Pupil)First AppearancesAnimeEpisode 9PortrayalJapanese VAHisayoshi IzakiYuki Kitazawa(北沢 由紀,Kitazawa Yuki?)wasEiri Uesugi's tutor while Eiri lived in America withTohma Seguchi. Not much is known about Kitazawa, except that he was an adult man living in New York City during the time Eiri was sent there by his family to study along with Tohma. Eiri became Kitazawa's pupil, with Kitazawa acting as a mentor figure to him. Later on, it became apparent that Kitazawa had a sexual obsession for his younger pupil. One night, Kitazawa orchestrated an ambush where Eiri was held captive. In a moment of extreme emotional distress and perceived betrayal, Eiri was forced to defend himself. This led to Eiri shooting and killing Kitazawa.
